name: code-quality
description: Pre-merge code quality plugin for Codex. Bundles slop-review (4-lens parallel review for AI-generated code, idiom drift, quality issues, and architecture/solution-fit) with size-review for PR split recommendations.

interface.shortDescription: Review code for AI slop, idiom drift, solution fit, and PR size
interface.longDescription: Use Code Quality in Codex for pre-merge review workflows: slop-review runs a calibrated 4-lens scan for AI-generated code patterns, idiom drift, concrete quality issues, and architecture or solution-fit problems; size-review decides whether a branch or PR should be split into stacked changes.
defaultPrompt: Review this diff for AI slop and solution-fit problems
Check whether this PR should be split into smaller stacked changes
Run a pre-merge code-quality review on my current branch
